description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named JWT CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has four jobs: coverage, fuzzing, asan, and ubsan, all running on ubuntu-latest or ubuntu-20.04. The coverage job checks out the repository, installs dependencies, configures and runs tests with coverage. The fuzzing job configures and runs fuzzing tests. The asan and ubsan jobs configure and run tests with address and undefined behavior sanitizers, respectively.
